That's fine! Here's the string variable without using any `

This ReactJS code displays a chart that visualizes financial sales data with drill-down functionality using Nivo charts library. It could be improved with better code readability and by breaking up the `graphData` useMemo hook into smaller reusable functions for better maintainability of the code.

Yes, I recommend breaking up the `graphData` hook into smaller, reusable functions to improve the maintainability of the code. This can be done by extracting some of the logic, such as the filtering of sales data and the calculation of group totals, into their own functions. This will make the code easier to read and maintain, and can also prevent bugs from accidentally repeating code.
